Item.name: Clownbat Uniform
Item.description: A clown outfit made for protecting the Honkmother's servants.

Item.name: Clownbat Ballistic Mask
Item.description: A full-face Ballistic mask for both protecting against lower velocity projectiles whilst preserving your beliefs.

sprite.name: Heavy Renegade Uniform Right Lower Arm
Heavy Renegade Uniform Left Lower Arm
Heavy Renegade Uniform Right Upper Arm
Heavy Renegade Uniform Left Upper Arm

Item.name: Handheld Fissile Accelerator
Item.description: A miniaturized version of a fissile accelerator. Fires faster and doesn't need to be carried on your back but overuse without proper protection may cause severe radiation sickness.

Item.name: Large Oxygen Tank
Item.description: Someone finally did it. Someone finally made a larger oxygen tank. It's not compatible with diving suits, so you'll need to refill bottles manually.
